definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.

  "node_id": "0071",
  "title": "应用商店已不再是唯一的增长入口。",
  "page_index": 44,
  "page_range": "44"
}

Section text:
应用商店已不再是唯一的增长入口 。
•用户正以自己的方式进入你的产品生态 ——来自Web、移动端，以及
Webshop 、第三方应用商店等新兴触点 。

message.content: This section addresses the shift in digital product growth strategies, claiming that app stores are no longer the exclusive user acquisition channel. It identifies the specific entities and touchpoints now driving ecosystem access: Web, mobile platforms, Webshops, and third-party app stores. The content can answer retrieval queries regarding: (1) current growth entry points and channel diversification; (2) how user access behavior has evolved toward multi-platform ecosystem entry; and (3) which emerging touchpoints supplement or replace traditional app stores. No dates, formal definitions, step-by-step procedures, tables, figures, quantitative metrics, or cited evidence types are present in this section.

   - *Topics:* User acquisition channels, product ecosystem entry points, growth strategy shifts.
